adds.rationale: NuScale is the only US SMR vendor with NRC design approval (uprated 77 MWe module cleared in 2024) and announced a TVA deployment agreement covering up to 6 GW across seven states, making it a near-term SMR pure-play that complements CCJ (uranium fuel cycle) and CEG (operating reactors plus hyperscaler PPAs).

news_evidence.summary: NuScale receives NRC design approval for uprated 250 MWt/77 MWe SMR module, the only SMR design with NRC clearance, supporting near-term ENTRA1 Energy plant deployment
Amazon anchors $500M Series C-1 in X-energy and signs SMR development deals with Energy Northwest and Dominion, validating the hyperscaler-driven SMR demand thesis that NuScale is positioned to serve
NuScale signs agreement with Tennessee Valley Authority to deploy up to 6 GW of SMR capacity across seven states, the largest US SMR commercial commitment to date

adds.rationale: Vertiv is the picks-and-shovels play on AI datacenter power and liquid cooling, with rack densities now exceeding 20 kW driving demand for its direct-to-chip CDUs, busbar, and UPS; complements our hyperscaler-and-chip AI exposure (MSFT/GOOGL/AMZN/NVDA/TSM) with infrastructure leverage.

news_evidence.summary: Vertiv launches 360AI high-density infrastructure portfolio designed for accelerated computing, claiming up to 50% faster deployment than traditional installs
Vertiv 2025 outlook flags accelerating AI-driven cooling and power demand and continued transition from air to liquid cooling as racks cross 20 kW

removes.rationale: GLP-1 revenue guidance miss in Q4 2024 triggered a ~21% three-month decline; trailing P/E still near 80x after the sell-off marks a peak-enthusiasm valuation breach for the demographics/obesity-drug thesis just as NVO competition and supply normalization weigh on growth.

news_evidence.summary: Eli Lilly shares fall after Q4 GLP-1 sales (Mounjaro/Zepbound) come in below company guidance; management cuts near-term revenue outlook
LLY has declined 21% over the past three months; P/E remains near 80x even after the pullback, leaving the stock 'priced to perfection' on GLP-1 growth

removes.rationale: BOTZ's top holdings are NVDA (~8.5%) and ISRG (~7.3%), both already in our watchlist directly, plus large weights in foreign industrials (ABB, Keyence, Fanuc) that dilute the AI-robotics theme; freeing the slot lets us hold a purer thematic pair (SMR, VRT) without losing exposure.

news_evidence.summary: BOTZ top-10 disclosure shows NVDA 8.5% and ISRG 7.3% as the dominant US weights, overlapping our direct holdings; remainder skews to Japanese/Swiss industrials with weaker AI leverage

rationale_overall: End-of-2024 rebalance trades two diffuse exposures (LLY's stretched obesity-drug bet and BOTZ's redundant robotics ETF) for two purer thematic plays the user named in the wave thesis: SMR as the NRC-approved US small modular reactor pure-play, and VRT as the AI datacenter power-and-cooling pick-and-shovel. Net wave shape: nuclear deepens from two to three names (CCJ + CEG + SMR), AI infrastructure gains a non-chip leg (VRT), and we shed a stretched demographics name and a fund-of-funds we already replicate. Cap of 16 preserved; no bucket exceeds 4.
